items.name: pressure-button
items.title: Pressure Button
items.description: A button that pushes back — press squash on flick, spring rebound on snap, and a hold-to-confirm gauge ring for destructive actions.

items.name: trace-input
items.title: Trace Input
items.description: Focus draws its own boundary — a stroke traces the field's perimeter, the label glides to an overline, and errors annotate themselves with a dimension line.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: The tick is drawn, not shown — a pathLength stroke on flick, an indeterminate dash that slides in, and group select-alls that cascade down the list.

items.name: breaker-switch
items.title: Breaker Switch
items.description: A toggle with mechanical conviction — the thumb stretches in anticipation while held, throws on snap, and squashes against the track end as the rail recoils.

items.name: caliper-slider
items.title: Caliper Slider
items.description: Reads like a vernier, moves like grease — 1:1 drag with a snap settle, ticks that lean toward the jaw, and a live measured-span dimension line in range mode.

items.name: drawer-accordion
items.title: Drawer Accordion
items.description: Opens like a specimen cabinet — height glides while the inner content lags a beat behind, like paper settling in a pulled drawer.

items.name: gantry-tabs
items.title: Gantry Tabs
items.description: The indicator rides a rail — its leading edge glides ahead while the trailing edge lags a beat, stretching toward the destination before contracting to fit.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A menu that unfolds from where you asked — the panel scales from the trigger's edge, options cascade in, and a highlight bar glides between them.

items.name: morph-dialog
items.title: Morph Dialog
items.description: The trigger becomes the dialog — a shared-element morph glides the card you clicked into the panel it opens, and reverses on close.

items.name: telemetry-toast
items.title: Telemetry Toast
items.description: Messages that queue like readings — recoil arrivals, a depth-receding stack, swipe dismissal with velocity projection, and timers that pause under your pointer.

items.name: readout
items.title: Readout
items.description: Numbers with momentum — per-digit vertical rolls with real carry propagation, so 199 → 200 visibly carries right to left.

items.name: focus-text
items.title: Focus Text
items.description: Copy that resolves under the lens — words sharpen from an 8px blur like a microscope focus-pull, cascaded under the 600ms budget.

items.name: scope-scrubber
items.title: Scope Scrubber
items.description: Drag a value; watch its physics — a scrub input with a live oscilloscope trace behind the numeral, where the settle spring's overshoot draws itself.

items.name: gyro-card
items.title: Gyro Card
items.description: A card with a sense of balance — pointer tilt with real inertia that overshoots past level and rebalances when you leave, with layered parallax and tracking glare.

items.name: flapboard
items.title: Flapboard
items.description: Split-flap departures for your data — each cell flips through intermediate characters with a column cascade, like an airport board settling.

items.name: metronome-loader
items.title: Metronome Loader
items.description: Waiting, kept honest — a pendulum, a bearing cradle, or a radar sweep; give it a value and it morphs into a determinate arc gauge.

items.name: ticker-tape
items.title: Ticker Tape
items.description: A marquee with friction — hover applies drag, grabbing tracks 1:1, and a fling carries real momentum that decays back to duty speed.

items.name: scan-reveal
items.title: Scan Reveal
items.description: Sections develop as the scanner passes — a scroll-linked scan line sweeps once, and content resolves beneath it with a coordinate readout riding the beam.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Selection that travels, never teleports — one shared dot glides between rings while the receiving ring arms with a squash and rebounds as it lands.

items.name: code-cells
items.title: Code Cells
items.description: Six digits, dropped into place — one hidden one-time-code input drives visual cells with digit drops, underline ticks, and a rejection nudge.

items.name: action-relay
items.title: Action Relay
items.description: A button that narrates the job — state labels roll through a one-line mask with a blur crossfade while the width follows the new content.

items.name: status-seal
items.title: Status Seal
items.description: Status, re-stamped on every change — variant swaps stamp in on recoil, a live pulse ring breathes at drift tempo, and counts carry-roll.

items.name: slipstream
items.title: Slipstream
items.description: A highlight that rides in your wake — one pill glides behind hovered or focused items with a trailing-edge stretch, in any direction.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A side panel on rails — slides in on glide, drags toward its edge 1:1, and a projected release past 40% lets it leave with the momentum it already has.

items.name: bottom-sheet
items.title: Bottom Sheet
items.description: It snaps where your gesture was going — velocity-projected releases settle on the nearest snap point in the gesture's direction, with rubber-band overdrag.

items.name: ledger
items.title: Ledger
items.description: Ten thousand rows, sixty frames — a hand-rolled virtualized table where sorting FLIPs only the rows you can see and selection cascades down the window.

items.name: zoetrope
items.title: Zoetrope
items.description: Spin the drum; every frame finds its detent — panels ride the inside of a cylinder with drag inertia, wheel steps, and angular-distance dimming.

items.name: flux-canvas
items.title: Flux Canvas
items.description: A gradient with a pulse — a tiny WebGL2 shader drives a drifting color mesh or a domain-warped noise field, tinted from your theme tokens.

items.name: wavefield
items.title: Wavefield
items.description: Ambient physics, drawn on canvas — interference lattices, drifting contours, breathing grids, and particle fields that pause when unseen.

items.name: phase-switch
items.title: Phase Switch
items.description: Day to night in one clean sweep — a framework-agnostic theme toggle that reveals the new theme as a circle growing from the button, via the View Transitions API.

items.name: cipher-text
items.title: Cipher Text
items.description: Characters lock in from the noise — glyphs cycle deterministically, then resolve left-to-right under the 600ms cascade budget with a signal pulse per lock.

items.name: magnet-dock
items.title: Magnet Dock
items.description: Icons that feel the cursor coming — a cosine distance field magnifies the dock, and drag-reorder parts neighbors magnetically before snapping into a slot.

items.name: conveyor-list
items.title: Conveyor List
items.description: A queue that moves like a belt — items drift in from the feed side, brake into their slot with a squash, and lift off the belt when removed.

items.name: callout
items.title: Callout
items.description: A tooltip with a leader line — the label pops from the anchor while a schematic elbow line draws itself to the card.

items.name: kinetic-gallery
items.title: Kinetic Gallery
items.description: Grab the strip and throw it — release carries momentum that decays and snaps the nearest frame to the rail, with prev/next and dot controls.

items.name: tile-grid
items.title: Tile Grid
items.description: Drag a tile and the grid reflows around it — the others FLIP-glide into their new slots, with a full keyboard lift-move-drop for reordering without a mouse.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented Control
items.description: A compact value picker whose raised thumb glides between segments on snap — radio-group semantics, so it selects a value rather than switching panels.

items.name: triage-deck
items.title: Triage Deck
items.description: A decision stack you flick through — throw a card right to accept or left to reject, a velocity-projected release commits, and the next card rises from behind.

items.name: spark-chart
items.title: Spark Chart
items.description: A compact line or area chart that draws itself on arrival, then lets you scrub a crosshair that snaps to the nearest point and reads its value.

items.name: activity-rings
items.title: Activity Rings
items.description: Concentric arcs that sweep from empty to their value on arrival, staggered under one budget, with a recoil bump the moment a ring completes.

items.name: coverflow
items.title: Coverflow
items.description: A cover gallery in perspective — the active card faces you while its neighbors bank away and recede, and any card you steer to glides to the front.

items.name: parallax-scene
items.title: Parallax Scene
items.description: A depth-layered diorama that parades its layers past the pointer — each sits at its own depth, the whole scene tilts toward your cursor and drifts back on leave.

items.name: tether-rope
items.title: Tether Rope
items.description: A hanging rope you grab and swing — a Verlet chain with gravity and length constraints, so it whips, goes taut, and settles like real cord.

items.name: pendulum-wave
items.title: Pendulum Wave
items.description: A rank of pendulums whose periods step apart — released together they drift through traveling waves and snap back into alignment on a fixed cycle.

items.name: rubber-sheet
items.title: Rubber Sheet
items.description: A taut mesh you pull toward the pointer with a smooth falloff; release and the vertices fire home, ringing through equilibrium twice before they settle.

items.name: iron-filings
items.title: Iron Filings
items.description: A canvas lattice of dash filings that align to the cursor like iron around a magnetic pole — near the pointer they snap radial and brighten, far off they relax and dim.

items.name: swarm-field
items.title: Swarm Field
items.description: A canvas flock of boids that murmur with emergent flocking and scatter from the cursor, then regroup — separation, alignment, cohesion, and flee, on a spatial hash.

items.name: magnetic-cursor
items.title: Magnetic Cursor
items.description: A pointer layer for fine cursors — a drift-lagged spotlight trails the cursor and any MagneticTarget leans toward it, then springs back; inert on touch and reduced motion.

items.name: aurora-ribbon
items.title: Aurora Ribbon
items.description: Slow sinusoidal ribbons of light that undulate across the field like an aurora and bend toward the pointer — a calm, luminous canvas backdrop.

items.name: point-globe
items.title: Point Globe
items.description: A globe of points on a Fibonacci sphere that drifts on its own and spins under your drag, carrying angular momentum — near points brighten, the far side dims.

items.name: voronoi-shatter
items.title: Voronoi Shatter
items.description: A Voronoi tessellation that fractures outward from your tap — shards fly, rotate, and fade, then ring back into place and reseal on the recoil spring.

items.name: comet-cursor
items.title: Comet Cursor
items.description: A contained field where the pointer drags a luminous comet — a bright head with a tapering tail that thickens with speed and collapses when you rest.

items.name: ripple-surface
items.title: Ripple Surface
items.description: Tap the surface and a wavefront propagates out; tap again and the rings overlap into visible interference — a calm canvas pond that answers every touch.

items.name: flow-diagram
items.title: Flow Diagram
items.description: A Sankey flow — nodes in columns, links sized to their value with a marching-dash current, and a hover that traces a node's whole upstream and downstream path.

items.name: timeline-spine
items.title: Timeline Spine
items.description: A scroll-linked timeline — a playhead rides the spine as you scroll, the spine fills behind it, and each event pops in as the head reaches it.

items.name: pull-to-refresh
items.title: Pull to Refresh
items.description: Over-pull the list past a calibrated detent and release — it holds to refresh, then settles back as the fresh rows cascade in.

items.name: orbit-menu
items.title: Orbit Menu
items.description: Items ring a hub and rotate on a weighted dial — flick the ring and it flings, then snaps the nearest item into the active detent at the top.

items.name: spark-burst
items.title: Spark Burst
items.description: A calibrated celebration, not confetti — call fire() and a tight radial burst of hairline rays and a fast ring shoots out and fades, monochrome with a signal glint.

items.name: heart-tap
items.title: Heart Tap
items.description: A like that celebrates — the heart squashes then pops, a tight ring of sparks bursts once, and the count rolls up; un-liking deflates and rolls back down.

items.name: reaction-fly
items.title: Reaction Fly
items.description: Press to bloom a reaction picker; choosing one sends a copy flying up — rising, drifting, and fading on its own jittered path — while its tally ticks up.

items.name: command-deck
items.title: Command Deck
items.description: A command palette that arms before it fires — a deliberate fill sweeps the selected row before execution, so destructive commands never feel accidental.

items.name: access-panel
items.title: Access Panel
items.description: Sign-in that unlocks like a vault — steps ride a gantry rail, OTP digits drop into their cells, and the right code throws a breaker bolt open.

items.name: iris-menu
items.title: Iris Menu
items.description: Actions bloom from where you pressed — items launch from the trigger's center to seats along the freest quadrant's arc, and fold back in on close.

items.name: overflow-rail
items.title: Overflow Rail
items.description: More actions, sprung from the dots — the pill rail morphs open inline while primaries yield with a recoil part and secondaries cascade in.

items.name: signal-center
items.title: Signal Center
items.description: An inbox that files itself — signals arrive on the conveyor, swipe away with real velocity, and clear-all sweeps the floor in a cascade.

items.name: media-console
items.title: Media Console
items.description: A media island that unfolds into a console — the pill morphs open into transport, a caliper timeline, and a scope-scrubbed volume.

items.name: checkout-receipt
items.title: Checkout Receipt
items.description: Payment that prints its proof — hold to pay, then a receipt feeds out of the slot line by line, tears off, and takes a PAID stamp.

items.name: intake-tray
items.title: Intake Tray
items.description: Files land, physically — dropped files fall into the tray with a squash, shingle into a stack, fill their gauge rings, and slide to the processed rail.

items.name: readout-grid
items.title: Readout Grid
items.description: Dashboard stats as instrument cards — a carry-rolling counter, a self-drawing sparkline, a split-flap delta, and a needle gauge, mounted with one cascade.

items.name: beacon
items.title: Beacon
items.description: One capsule, every live activity — the shell morphs between timer, upload, call, and now-playing views with blur crossfades, corners pinned.

items.name: field-report
items.title: Field Report
items.description: Feedback that files itself — a notch rating with a gliding indicator, a growing note field, and a submit that folds the form into a slot under a LOGGED stamp.

items.name: not-found
items.title: Not Found
items.description: Sweep complete, sector empty — a radar arc scans a quiet grid while the 404 numeral deciphers itself, with home and command-deck exits.

items.name: forecast-card
items.title: Forecast Card
items.description: Every vote moves every bar — one commit renormalizes the whole field while percentages carry-roll and the leader tick migrates to the new front-runner.

items.name: balance-card
items.title: Balance Card
items.description: A balance with a private side — the numeral carry-rolls behind a privacy blur, a sparkline draws itself, and the card flips to its activity face.

items.name: exchange-panel
items.title: Exchange Panel
items.description: Two units, one clean swap — the edited side is live, the computed side carry-rolls after a debounce, and swapping keeps focus while contents trade places.

items.name: launch-checklist
items.title: Launch Checklist
items.description: Onboarding checklist where ticks draw themselves, finished steps strike through and settle to the bottom, and completing the set lands a CALIBRATED stamp.

items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: Class-name composition helper shared by every component.

items.name: motion
items.title: Calibration Set
items.description: Kinetiq's five calibrated springs plus the tween scale, cascade budget, and exit rules — the shared physics vocabulary every component draws from.

items.name: use-motion-safe
items.title: useMotionSafe
items.description: Single source of truth for reduced-motion decisions: combines the OS preference with an optional app-level override context.

items.name: agents-rules
items.title: Agent Rules
items.description: Kinetiq's operating rules for coding agents: the five-spring motion language, the tween scale, the 600ms cascade budget, the reduced-motion policy, token usage, and composition guidance. Installs as AGENTS.md at your repo root so your agent stays on the system's vocabulary.
